arts.ttl: Aston Villa's rivals know they are vulnerable - do not be surprised if Arsenal bid again for Ollie Watkins, writes TOM COLLOMOSSE... with three other stars also attracting interest
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Villa are vulnerable. It may not look that way, as they look ahead to the Champions League knockout rounds and continue to perform strongly under Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Champions League draw: Who could Liverpool Arsenal, Manchester City, Aston Villa face in the round of 16?
arts.sum: Premier League sides now know who they can face in the next round of the Champions League following the conclusion of the league phase of the competition on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Idah scores twice in two minutes to draw Celtic level at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Celtic's Adam Idah scores twice in two minutes to pull back a two-goal deficit against Aston Villa in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Celtic show maturity at Villa but smoke bomb puts their fans under a cloud | Ewan Murray
arts.sum: Players showed they are no longer European cannon fodder but supporters’ actions at Villa Park could trigger a ban on them travelling to Madrid or Munich As meaningful Champions League progress arrives, the pity for Celtic’s supporters is that they may be denied the chance to see their team compete in the flesh at that stage. Uefa issued a suspended ban on Celtic selling tickets for an away fixture in Europe in response to the lighting of fireworks during the hammering at Borussia Dortmund. Should Uefa deem a smoke bomb, tossed on to the Villa Park playing surface during celebrations for Adam Idah’s first goal, triggers that sanction then no Celtic fans will travel to Munich or Madrid next month. Ouch. So much depends on the report submitted by Adrian Casha, Uefa’s delegate at this game. Celtic are praying for leniency. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Villa's Durán close to Al Nassr move
arts.sum: Colombian striker Jhon Durán is closing in on a move to Al Nassr. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Villa's Rogers fires hat-trick against Celtic
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers scores a hat-trick for Aston Villa against Celtic as The Villans seal automatic qualification to the last 16 of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Celtic end group stage with see-saw defeat at Villa
arts.sum: Watch highlights as a hat-trick from Morgan Rogers and twelfth goal of the season from Arsenal target Ollie Watkins lead Aston Villa to a thrilling 4-2 victory over Celtic in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'Villa Park bedlam sums up Celtic's gripping European campaign'
arts.sum: Celtic's enthralling defeat at Aston Villa was a near-perfect illustration of the club's gripping, and ultimately successful, Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: Idah scores twice in two minutes to draw Celtic level at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Celtic's Adam Idah scores twice in two minutes to pull back a two-goal deficit against Aston Villa in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'Maybe we have to sell some players' - will Watkins or Duran leave Villa?
arts.sum: Aston Villa have decisions to make before Monday's transfer deadline with strikers Ollie Watkins and Jhon Duran wanted men.
